general_info.definition: Amine-functionalized fluorescent carbon dots with positive charge

method.conditions: 200°C for 5h in a Teflon-lined stainless steel autoclave (25mL)

post_treatment: Dialysis against ultrapure water for 24 hours

applications.performance: Linear range: 0-20 µM and 40-200 µM; Limit of Detection: 0.86 µM
applications.comparative_advantage: Dual-signal response provides self-calibration and better anti-interference compared to single-signal assays

applications.performance: Linear range: 0-60 µM and 80-1000 µM; Limit of Detection: 0.96 µM
applications.comparative_advantage: Successful detection in human serum with recoveries of 95-112%

applications.performance: Linear range: 1-10 U L-1 and 20-100 U L-1; Limit of Detection: 0.98 U L-1
applications.comparative_advantage: The experimental results indicate that the CDs/AgNPs system is qualified to ratiometrically detect GOx activity.
